case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. EMAD M ZAWAYDEH et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2008 CONTINUED TO JAN-05-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE NOV-03-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
